name: Changan Minsheng APLL Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Changan Minsheng APLL Logistics Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides supply chain management services for automobiles and automobile raw materials, components, and parts in Mainland China. It is involved in the integrated transportation of domestic and foreign spare parts; transportation of bulk cargo and large equipment; provision of suppliers warehouse management, production-distribution, modular subpackage, commercial vehicle warehouse management and shipment, after-sales parts warehouse and shipment, bonded warehousing, logistics solution designing, logistics advisory and training, and other services; and packaging of knocked down kits. The company also engages in the sale of packaging materials, as well as processing of tires. In addition, it offers sea, air, river, railway, and road transport services for import and export of cargos, as well as conducts door-to-door services. The company was formerly known as CMA Logistics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changan Minsheng APLL Logistics Co., Ltd. in December 2006. Changan Minsheng APLL Logistics Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
